Assembly: The assembly idPhaFune2.1 is based on 44x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Sample is of the heterogametic sex. The X chromosome was assigned based on read coverage statistics. A Y is likely to be collapsed and reside within the unplaced scaffolds but could not be confidently assigned.
